tickets.title: ECS task fails health check after Terraform apply
tickets.description: After deploying the new task definition, the ALB marks targets unhealthy. Container logs show the app binds to 127.0.0.1 instead of 0.0.0.0.

comments.author: livingdevops
comments.content: Reproduced in staging — health endpoint returns 200 locally but ALB gets connection refused.

comments.author: devopscaptain
comments.content: Found it: gunicorn bind flag missing in Dockerfile CMD. PR incoming.

comments.author: devopscaptain
comments.content: Fixed in commit abc123 — ready for review.

subtasks.title: Verify ALB target group health in staging
Roll out fix to production ECS service

tickets.title: Add GitHub Actions pipeline for Docker build and push to ECR
tickets.description: Epic to automate container builds on every push to main. Should run tests, build image, push to ECR, and trigger ECS deploy.

comments.author: devopscaptain
comments.content: Let's start with CI only — CD can be a follow-up once we're confident.

subtasks.title: Create workflow file for pytest on PR
Add Docker build step with layer caching
Configure AWS OIDC for ECR push (no long-lived keys)
Wire ECS service update on main branch merge

tickets.title: Postgres connection pool exhausted under load test
tickets.description: Running locust against /health and dashboard routes causes SQLAlchemy pool timeout errors after ~200 concurrent users.

comments.author: livingdevops
comments.content: Default pool size is 5 — bumped to 20 in config. Need review before prod.

subtasks.title: Re-run load test and capture metrics

tickets.title: Story: Self-service retro board creation for team leads
tickets.description: Currently only admins can create retros. Team leads should request retro creation through a ticket workflow.

subtasks.title: Define team_lead role in User model

tickets.title: Rotate exposed DATABASE_URL in docker-compose
tickets.description: Bootcamp repo has plaintext postgres password in compose file. Rotate creds and document env-based secrets for ECS.

comments.author: livingdevops
comments.content: Not a prod leak but good hygiene before open-sourcing the lab.

subtasks.title: Update Terraform to pull secret from AWS Secrets Manager

tickets.title: Prometheus metrics missing retro endpoint labels
tickets.description: The /metrics counter groups all retro routes as unknown. Need proper endpoint names for retro.list_retros, retro.view_retro, etc.

comments.author: devopscaptain
comments.content: Low priority but makes Grafana dashboards useless.

comments.author: livingdevops
comments.content: Fixed — retro blueprint now registers named endpoints correctly.
